title: PLA Maintains Elevated Pressure — 2 Sorties Cross Median Line; 9 PLAN Vessels Operating
detail: Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense detected 2 PLA aircraft sorties and 9 PLAN vessels plus 1 official ship operating around Taiwan as of April 14, 2026. Both sorties crossed the Taiwan Strait median line, maintaining a baseline of aerial incursions two days after KMT Chairwoman Cheng Li-wun's departure from Beijing on April 12. Naval presence remained elevated at 9 vessels — slightly above the post-KMT-visit baseline — indicating sustained maritime pressure. The pattern reflects PLA's continued multi-vector posture of air and sea pressure approximately 30 days before the scheduled Trump-Xi summit in Beijing (May 14–15). China's Defense Ministry has characterized all such activities as 'lawful operations safeguarding national sovereignty.'

sources.name: American Enterprise Institute — China & Taiwan Update

media.caption: AEI China & Taiwan Update covering April 14–17, 2026 PLA military activities around Taiwan
